query:
UPDATE services SET 
  image = CASE 
    WHEN slug = 'architectural-bim' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663379809910/dQGMwfPzENE9oJMqbRVUVv/architectural-bim-service-Hk7zjUE49Sdbjq9pYCPJFS.webp'
    WHEN slug = 'mepf-design' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663379809910/dQGMwfPzENE9oJMqbRVUVv/mepf-bim-service-FrkTUS7LaaRwnNnZ4xxHsm.webp'
    WHEN slug = '3d-visualization' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663379809910/dQGMwfPzENE9oJMqbRVUVv/structural-bim-service-E5VHqNtdrQfBctDehjTxzM.webp'
    ELSE image
  END,
  description = CASE
    WHEN slug = 'architectural-bim' THEN 'Our architectural BIM services provide comprehensive 3D modeling and coordination for building designs. From conceptual design through construction documentation, we deliver precise Revit models with LOD 100-500 accuracy. Our team ensures seamless integration of architectural elements with structural and MEP systems, preventing costly conflicts and rework. We specialize in multi-discipline coordination, clash detection, and detailed construction documentation.'
    WHEN slug = 'mepf-design' THEN 'Complete mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and fire protection design solutions using advanced BIM technology. Our MEPF services include system design, 3D modeling, coordination, and detailed shop drawings. We create comprehensive BIM models that integrate all building systems, ensuring optimal performance and constructability. Our expertise covers HVAC design, electrical distribution, plumbing layout, and fire protection systems with full coordination and clash resolution.'
    WHEN slug = '3d-visualization' THEN 'Stunning 3D visualizations and renderings that bring your projects to life. Our visualization services include photorealistic renderings, walkthrough animations, and interactive presentations. Perfect for client presentations, marketing materials, and design validation. We create compelling visual narratives that help stakeholders understand your design vision and make informed decisions.'
    ELSE description
  END
WHERE slug IN ('architectural-bim', 'mepf-design', '3d-visualization');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nLTEuQhDwWZW7wX.0273048ae673 --database dQGMwfPzENE9oJMqbRVUVv --execute UPDATE services SET

We create compelling visual narratives that help stakeholders understand your design vision and make informed decisions.'
